subject: French
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: 10.0: ACCOMMODATION AND HYGIENE
topics: Accommodation and hygiene are two sides of the same coin that are closely linked to
environment awareness. Hygiene plays a crucial role in ensuring good health, comfort and
overall well-being. Understanding the importance of accommodation and hygiene helps
learners to take care of their surroundings and make informed choices about where they live
activities:  Show pictures of different types of houses (traditional and modern).
 Learners describe and identify modern and traditional houses in the pictures provided.
(en bois, en brique, en bous ciment/en terre battue, en étage …).
 Explain the traditional and modern types of houses in French.
assessment: ii. Materials used for personal hygiene.
Teaching and learning Materials: Tempo 1, Equipe
